_comment: EP04 일상 — 재잘재잘 narrator scenes. Each cut has multiple timed scenes; captions update through the clip like a documentary voice-over (text version). Modeled after @tvhesuinbada4267 reference where captions narrate the action continuously instead of titling once. Each scene's start/end are relative to the 4s cut window.

scenes.en: Must be the tastiest thing ever
A paw twitch... must be dreaming
After playing, it always ends like this
The most peaceful moment at home
